verified.description: Free Public APIs API exposes freePublicAPIs now has a free public API! The Free Public APIs API provides up-to-date information on every free public API listed on freepublicapis.com. Perfect for developers, students and hobbyists. It is limited to 1000 requests a day, if you need more, feel free to reach out. Also if you build something with this API, make sure to add it as a showcase project here. sampleJson.title: Free Public APIs API
sampleJson.description: FreePublicAPIs now has a free public API! The Free Public APIs API provides up-to-date information on every free public API listed on freepublicapis.com. Perfect for developers, students and hobbyists. It is limited to 1000 requests a day, if you need more, feel free to reach out. Also if you build something with this API, make sure to add it as a showcase project here.

verified.name: CheapShark API
verified.tagline: CheapShark API — CheapShark is a price comparison website for digital PC…
verified.description: CheapShark API exposes cheapShark is a price comparison website for digital PC Games, tracking prices across multiple stores including Steam, GreenManGaming, and Fanatical. The API provides developers with access to CheapShark pricing data to integrate into their own applications or websites. We verified a keyless GET endpoint returning JSON (Open Data). Check the provider docs for rate limits and terms before production use.

verified.name: IPLocate.io
verified.tagline: IPLocate.io — Fast, free, accurate IP geolocation and threat data (pr…
verified.description: IPLocate.io exposes fast, free, accurate IP geolocation and threat data (proxy/VPN/hosting detection) API We verified a keyless GET endpoint returning JSON (Development). Check the provider docs for rate limits and terms before production use.

verified.name: Polish Bank Branches
verified.tagline: Polish Bank Branches — Polish bank branch lookup by 8-digit clearing number (N
verified.description: Polish Bank Branches exposes polish bank branch lookup by 8-digit clearing number (Numer Rozliczeniowy) or full 26-digit IBAN, free, no API key We verified a keyless GET endpoint returning JSON (Finance). Check the provider docs for rate limits and terms before production use.

verified.name: Open Food Facts API
verified.tagline: Open Food Facts API — Open Food Facts is a free, open database of food produc…
verified.description: Open Food Facts API exposes open Food Facts is a free, open database of food products worldwide. Its API turns a barcode into ingredients, nutrition, Nutri-Score, allergens and images, with no API key. We verified a keyless GET endpoint returning JSON (Food & Drink). Check the provider docs for rate limits and terms before production use.
